title: Kay parity-baseline manifest
description: Phase 1 scaffolding. Produced by follow-on task EVAL-01a.

docker_shas.description: Map of Docker image name to pulled SHA at run time.

openrouter_model.description: OpenRouter model path used for the run (e.g. 'anthropic/claude-opus-4.6').

run_date.description: ISO-8601 date the run was executed.

harbor_commit_sha.description: Harbor framework commit SHA at run time.

transcript_path.description: Relative path to transcript.jsonl inside this directory.

summary_score.description: Percentage score on Terminal-Bench 2.0 (must be >= 80 to pass the gate).

parity_baseline_tag.description: Signed git tag name pointing at the commit used for the run.

sample_budget_usd.description: Actual OpenRouter credits spent (informational; D-22 budget is $100).
